title: Characterizing Schedules Based on Serializability
description: A flowchart depicting the decision process for classifying a database schedule as serializable, conflict-serializable, or non-serializable.
relationships: Check 'Is the schedule conflict equivalent to a serial schedule?'
If yes, follow path to 'Conflict-Serializable Schedule'
If no, check 'Is the schedule view equivalent to a serial schedule?'
If yes, follow path to 'Serializable Schedule (but not Conflict-Serializable)'
If no, follow path to 'Non-Serializable Schedule'
